# Fidelity Money Market Funds — After-Tax Yield

## Purpose

This page compares Fidelity money market funds using scraped 7-day yields and an approximate after-tax calculation for a single filer in New Jersey.

## Interactions

- Choose System, Light, or Dark theme.
- Select a federal marginal tax bracket.
- Select a New Jersey state tax bracket.
- Filter funds by category.
- Expand the fund list to show all funds.
- Use the bracket matrix to compare the winning fund for every federal and New Jersey bracket combination.

## Data and assumptions

- Active tax year: 2026.
- Fund data is sourced from Fidelity's all-class money market rate sheet.
- Yields are seven-day yields and are net of the displayed expense ratio.
- New Jersey exemption percentages are approximate assumptions and may vary by year.

## Accessibility

All controls are labeled and keyboard accessible. The fund list and bracket matrix expose their values in the accessibility tree.
